detail: Consolidated cycles 1-8 experiment as a promoted Metaflow flow. HYPOTHESIS + CLAIMS written; conf/ (12 methods, data, training, experiment); flow.py seams+DAG+controls.

flow-lint PASS (exit 0). Smoke test: all 9 arm-kinds train+calibrate; static_ple captures sharp band (0.364 vs static_log 0.128) = positive-control mechanism works; PLE pays deficit on log_linear. GRU arms undertrained at 10-epoch smoke (expected) -> validate real regime before full run.

1-seed real-regime validation: GRU arms CONVERGE (gru_ple sharp 0.512 vs smoke 0.123; near oracle) -> undertraining resolved. Mechanism visible: static_ple sharp 0.556 vs static_log 0.111 (positive control fires); PLE deficit on log_linear; projection>log on curved. Fixed: entrypoint (flow silently no-op'd), MetaflowException->RuntimeError, gate keyed on ROBUST sharp lever (curvature weak -> reported not gated).

Technical code-review (verdict: correct enough to run, no result-invalidating bug). Fixed all 6: B1 raw encoder now train-fit stats (was per-split leakage); B2+B4 label DGP now single fixed function - aggregate-norm + intercept train-fit, intercept solved for mean prevalence=base (realized 0.078); B3 Holm-Bonferroni added to lift table (gate stays single uncorrected test); B5 removed dead _PoolLinear + static build branch + bseed; B6 DEVICE=cpu + single-thread so single_worker determinism actually holds. Smoke: lint pass, PR-AUC unchanged by calibration, 38s/cell -> ~51min full grid.

Consolidated cycles 1-8 Metaflow flow complete. Gates: lint PASS, pipeline-reviewer (fidelity, fixed), code-correctness review (6 bugs fixed incl 2 leakage), validation (GRU convergence), NaN-divergence hardened (grad clip + temperature guard). Final 8-seed run SUCCESSFUL: instrument TRUSTWORTHY (positive control static_ple sharp +0.46 CI-clear). Confirmed: sharp=dominant PLE lever (+0.46/+0.43), curvature IS a GRU lever (+0.10/+0.12), smooth->projection. 3 anomalies flagged (static-curvature weak, raw estimand artifact, mlp_ple capacity). Determinism: nondeterministic (torch CPU GRU not bit-reproducible; 8-seed CIs are the reproducibility guarantee).
